<!-- One or two sentences. What did you do? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->

## The studio checklist

- [ ] This is **one small, focused change** (split it if it grew large).
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/check.sh` and it's happy.
- [ ] If I changed behavior, I updated **`CHANGELOG.md`** (under `## [Unreleased]`).
- [ ] If I changed behavior, I updated the **human doc** it touches (README / docs / ventures).
- [ ] I kept everything **child-safe, kind, honest, and legal** (esp. in `ventures/`).
- [ ] I understand every line I'm submitting (even if an AI helped write it).

## Anything reviewers should know

<!-- Screenshots, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
